pi_items.source: Task description implicitly and export_result.sh explicitly checking for %24%3A%2Fcustom%2FProjectDashboard in the local API.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly checking for the $:/tags/SideBar tag in the file content and API response.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly checking for the caption: Projects in the file content and API response.
Task description specifying the list filter tag[ProjectAlpha] and export_result.sh searching for tag[ProjectAlpha] in the file content.
Task description specifying the sort filter sort[title] and export_result.sh searching for sort[title] in the file content.

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to create a specific custom sidebar tab in TiddlyWiki. The data is entirely synthetically generated in setup_task.sh as JSON notes. The target tiddler title ($:/custom/ProjectDashboard), the tag ($:/tags/SideBar), the caption (Projects), the list filter (tag[ProjectAlpha]), and the sort filter (sort[title]) are all explicitly required by the task description and dynamically enforced by export_result.sh.
